input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.7.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.7.4
            TITLE: test method

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.7.4: Test Method
F.8.7.4 Test Method 
Get the peak force from physical testing of the Impact Attenuator and any Non Crushable 
Object(s) as one of the two: 
a. Tested together with the Impact Attenuator  
b. Tested with the Impact Attenuator not attached, and add the peak load from F.8.7.2

final_answer: rule F.8.7.4: Test Method F.8.7.4 Test Method Get the peak force from physical testing of the Impact Attenuator and any Non Crushable Object(s) as one of the two: a. Tested together with the Impact Attenuator b. Tested with the Impact Attenuator not attached, and add the peak load from F.8.7.2
